ticket_goal: Button for user to report issue
ticket_description: Add a dedicated button or section for users to report issues directly from within the app, improving feedback loops and bug tracking.

main-agent.action: Context reset and initialized for new ticket

TECHNICAL_SPECS.synthesis: Persona A advocated for an in-app feedback form to capture user reports regarding third-party API flakes, improving UX. Persona B noted that this requires new backend routing, potential spam/rate-limiting challenges, and an Admin UI to actually triage the reports. The system currently relies on Sentry for automated error tracking.
TECHNICAL_SPECS.strategic_importance: Low for the current phase. While user feedback is valuable, building an internal ticketing or feedback DB system is architectural noise compared to stabilizing the core video distribution pipeline.
TECHNICAL_SPECS.production_readiness: N/A (Parked). If implemented, would strictly require Upstash Redis rate-limiting, Zod validation, and an anti-spam mechanism.
TECHNICAL_SPECS.dependency_impact_radius: Would require database schema changes (e.g., a Feedback model) or integration with a new service like Resend/Sendgrid, plus Admin UI updates to view reports.
TECHNICAL_SPECS.rationale: Deferred to a later phase. The platform currently uses Sentry for automated bug tracking. Implementing a manual, database-backed feedback system introduces premature complexity (Admin triage UI, spam prevention, new API routes) that distracts from core capabilities. A simple mailto: link could be used instead if urgently needed, but full backend integration is parked.

success_indicators: Task parked. Awaiting project-agent to label issue as phase:2 and update project board.
